languages.original_text: "I, in turn, strongly advise you to no longer keep anything in the laboratory that would tempt me into visiting. For the sake of your... 'colleague's' mental well-being."

languages.text: "Со своей стороны, настоятельно рекомендую более не хранить в лаборатории ничего, что может вызвать у меня желание туда наведаться. Это сбережет душевное здоровье вашего... "коллеги".
"I, in turn, strongly advise you to no longer keep anything in the laboratory that would tempt me into visiting. For the sake of your... 'colleague's' mental well-being."
languages.original_text: "Со своей стороны, настоятельно рекомендую более не хранить в лаборатории ничего, что может вызвать у меня желание туда наведаться. Это сбережет душевное здоровье вашего... "коллеги".

traits.locale_text: "I, in turn, strongly advise you to no longer keep anything in the laboratory that would tempt me into visiting. For the sake of your... 'colleague's' mental well-being."
"I, in turn, strongly advise you to no longer keep anything in the laboratory that would tempt me into visiting. For the sake of your... 'colleague's' mental well-being."
"I, in turn, strongly advise you to no longer keep anything in the laboratory that would tempt me into visiting. For the sake of your... 'colleague's' mental well-being."

languages.text: «Yo, por mi parte, le recomiendo encarecidamente que deje de depositar en su laboratorio artículos que me tienten a visitarlo. Por la salud mental de su... "colega"».
languages.original_text: "I, in turn, strongly advise you to no longer keep anything in the laboratory that would tempt me into visiting. For the sake of your... 'colleague's' mental well-being."

traits.locale_text: «Yo, por mi parte, le recomiendo encarecidamente que deje de depositar en su laboratorio artículos que me tienten a visitarlo. Por la salud mental de su... "colega"».

languages.text: 「こちらこそ、私を訪問へと誘うようなものを、今後いっさい研究室に置かないよう強く忠告する。あなたの……『同僚』の精神衛生のためにもな」
languages.original_text: "I, in turn, strongly advise you to no longer keep anything in the laboratory that would tempt me into visiting. For the sake of your... 'colleague's' mental well-being."

traits.locale_text: 「こちらこそ、私を訪問へと誘うようなものを、今後いっさい研究室に置かないよう強く忠告する。あなたの……『同僚』の精神衛生のためにもな」

languages.text: “那么，作为回应，我也强烈建议，别再把任何引我造访的东西留在实验室。就当是为了你那位……‘同僚’的心理健康着想。”
languages.original_text: "I, in turn, strongly advise you to no longer keep anything in the laboratory that would tempt me into visiting. For the sake of your... 'colleague's' mental well-being."

traits.locale_text: “那么，作为回应，我也强烈建议，别再把任何引我造访的东西留在实验室。就当是为了你那位……‘同僚’的心理健康着想。”

languages.text: "Und ich rate Euch dringend, in Eurem Labor nichts aufzubewahren, das meinen Besuch erforderlich machen könnte. Im Sinne des ... geistigen Wohlbefindens Eures 'Kollegen'."
languages.original_text: "I, in turn, strongly advise you to no longer keep anything in the laboratory that would tempt me into visiting. For the sake of your... 'colleague's' mental well-being."

traits.locale_text: "Und ich rate Euch dringend, in Eurem Labor nichts aufzubewahren, das meinen Besuch erforderlich machen könnte. Im Sinne des ... geistigen Wohlbefindens Eures 'Kollegen'."

languages.text: « Dans ce cas, permettez-moi d'insister pour que vous ne gardiez rien au laboratoire qui pourrait m'inciter à y venir. C'est dans l'intérêt de votre... "collègue". »
languages.original_text: "I, in turn, strongly advise you to no longer keep anything in the laboratory that would tempt me into visiting. For the sake of your... 'colleague's' mental well-being."

traits.locale_text: « Dans ce cas, permettez-moi d'insister pour que vous ne gardiez rien au laboratoire qui pourrait m'inciter à y venir. C'est dans l'intérêt de votre... "collègue". »

languages.text: "Ben de karşılığında size, laboratuvarda beni ziyaret etmeye teşvik edecek hiçbir şey bulundurmamanızı şiddetle tavsiye ederim... 'Meslektaşınızın' ruh sağlığı için."
languages.original_text: "I, in turn, strongly advise you to no longer keep anything in the laboratory that would tempt me into visiting. For the sake of your... 'colleague's' mental well-being."

traits.locale_text: "Ben de karşılığında size, laboratuvarda beni ziyaret etmeye teşvik edecek hiçbir şey bulundurmamanızı şiddetle tavsiye ederim... 'Meslektaşınızın' ruh sağlığı için."
